text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Trainer... Would you consider bananas to be a
snack?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In addition to being packed with vitamins,
minerals, and fiber, they also provide glucose,
which our minds use as an energy source.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, I propose that they be relabeled... as a
meal.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If you have any arguments, let's hear them—right
here, right now. We shall debate this topic until
we both reach an agreement.
